name: pipeline
description:
Execute a multi-stage delegation pipeline.

Delegates a task through a sequence of identity tiers in order. Each stage receives the original task plus the output from the previous stage. Only the final stage's result is returned.

Example: stages=["eng", "qa"] delegates to eng first, then qa reviews eng's output.

stages.description: Ordered list of identity tiers to delegate through

task.description: Natural language description of the task for the pipeline
